name: ahoo-skills
description: Claude Code Skills for Ahoo-Wang open source projects — DDD, CQRS, Event Sourcing, distributed systems, and more

plugins.name: agent-system-prompt
plugins.description: Design and write system prompts, personas, and behavioral rules for AI agents and chatbots

plugins.name: coapi-developer

plugins.name: cosec-troubleshoot

plugins.description: Build typed event bus systems with serial, parallel, and cross-tab broadcast execution strategies

plugins.name: fetcher-integration
